heading: Usage
body:
Connect directly to an AI agent as a tool to perform
[agentic RAG](agentic-rag).

```text
AI Agent (tools connector) → MongoDB Vector Store
```

For a tutorial, see [Build an AI Agent with MongoDB and n8n](n8n-get-started).

To learn more about AI agents in n8n, see
[AI agent node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/cluster-nodes/root-nodes/n8n-nodes-langchain.agent/).

codeBlocks.content: AI Agent (tools connector) → MongoDB Vector Store
